reviews.review_msg: Paul is genuinely nice guy who is approachable and passionate about what he teaches.  That being said, he knows SO much about Chinese texts, philosophy & history that he can tend to talk complicatedly about a lot of things that we beginners know nothing about.    It helps if you are extremely interested in the subject to begin with.

The class context is okay; however, the professor will make you do a group presentation, and she does not care about your work. She will give the grade based on the overall performance of the group. Similar to the Discussion, which is heavily graded is in a group. It is hard to ask for her help. She is barely available, even by email.
A great class to take if you interest in the Asian novel and culture.

In my view, Professor Kong made the course very interesting and engaging. The novels used in this course may be difficult for some students to read and grasps the main concepts, but it was very easy to follow as she provides weekly reading responses/discussions. Overall, I would love to take another class with Professor Kong. She's a great prof!
